title: Triage an Azure AuthorizationFailed to the exact scope and role
description: Walk the scope hierarchy and use Check Access / activity log to find the missing role assignment before granting anything broad.
body: Use when an Azure operation fails with AuthorizationFailed and you need the minimal grant. Do not assign Contributor to move on. Actions: read the error for the action and the scope it was evaluated at, use the portal Check Access or az role assignment list for the principal across management-group->subscription->RG->resource, identify the missing dataAction/action, and assign the matching built-in role at the narrowest scope. Validation signals include Check Access showing the principal gains the action and a clean retry, with no broadening at higher scopes. Risk boundary: if only a high-scope or Owner assignment seems to work, stop and escalate.
